verifier.method: pnpm verify + pnpm test:db + t1-proof test

static_proof.description: Fix markClosingLines in packages/db/src/runtime-repositories.ts — two bugs: wrong source table (ON ONLY index) and wrong ID namespace for provider_offer_current UPDATE.
bugs_fixed: Bug 1: SELECT from provider_offer_history_compact (non-partitioned, indexed by provider_event_id) instead of provider_offer_history (ON ONLY index not inherited by 60+ child partitions)
Bug 2: UPDATE provider_offer_current using .in('identity_key', ...) instead of .in('id', historyIds) which always produced 0 matches
Added: UPDATE provider_offer_history_compact.is_closing=true via snapshot_id PK for idempotency

runtime_proof.description: pnpm test:db (7/7 pass) + T1 proof test (3/3 pass) against live Supabase

queries.description: UTV2-920: invalid atomic enqueue writes no lifecycle event or outbox row
UTV2-920: invalid atomic delivery confirmation rolls back
UTV2-920: invalid atomic settlement writes no settlement row
UTV2-883: no duplicate participants for same external_id and sport
UTV2-996: re-settling creates correction, no duplicate base rows
UTV2-996: correction chain additive, original row not mutated
UTV2-1366: markClosingLines compact source — real event < 20s (idempotent run)
